name: Space Text Adventure Game
story:
You and your crew are on a mission on Mars when your spaceship is invaded by an Alien.
You will need to defeat the Alien before your crew becomes its’ dinner,
but first you will need a collection of items to aid you in your fight.
You will need a space blaster to shoot the alien
a space phone to call the base station for back up,
space boots for gravitational manipulation to help dodge the aliens’ attacks,
a bowl of Marshmallow Moonies for the energy you will need for the battle,
an infodisk to learn the aliens’ weaknesses
and a weight to buff yourself up for battle.
loseBattleMessage: You were eaten by the Alien!
